Our Story

Authentic Surti Flavours

✻

Welcome to Surti Anda House — where every egg tells a story! We bring you the authentic, bold street flavours of Surat right here in Werribee. From sizzling curries to creamy omelettes with freshly baked pav, our recipes are crafted with love, tradition, and a whole lot of spice.

We believe great food doesn't need walls. Our food truck rolls out every evening, serving the Surti anda experience that Melbourne has been waiting for.

🌶️
Bold FlavoursAuthentic Surti spice blends
🍳
Fresh DailyMade to order every evening
🚚
Food TruckPickup orders welcome

⚠️ Allergy Notice: All of our menu items contain eggs and may also include or come into contact with other common allergens such as dairy, wheat, soy, nuts, and gluten. While we take food safety seriously, we cannot guarantee the absence of cross-contamination. Please inform our staff of any allergies prior to ordering.
